================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 4E 20 3E F9
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1823
Reflected CC   : 0x06
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 1

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1823
ReflectedCC  : 0x06
PayloadLen   : 1

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1823

[PAYLOAD HEX]
01 

[RETURN VALUE]
01 

[BINARY DATA]
